scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json && cp src/collection.json dist/collection.json && for f in src/*/schema.json; do cp $f dist/${f#src/}; done && for d in src/*/files; do cp -r $d dist/$(dirname ${d#src/})/; done
scripts.test: rm -rf out && tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp src/collection.json out/collection.json && for f in src/*/schema.json; do cp $f out/${f#src/}; done && for d in src/*/files; do cp -r $d out/$(dirname ${d#src/})/; done && jasmine out/**/*_spec.js
